footer.tagline: Turn personal stories into lyrics, audio, and producer-style reports.

seo.title: Hit-Song - Turn Your Story Into an AI Song
seo.description: Create AI-generated lyrics, audio, and producer-style song reports from a personal story in minutes.

home.eyebrow: AI music creation from your story

hero.title: Hit-Song turns your story into lyrics, audio, and a shareable report
hero.subtitle: Describe a feeling, memory, or message. Hit-Song shapes it into structured lyrics, generates AI audio, scores the result, and gives you a public page to share.

demo.label: Example prompt
demo.prompt: A late-night train ride after a breakup, trying to feel brave again.
demo.output: Verse, chorus, and emotional arc ready for audio generation.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three focused steps from raw story to a song you can share.

story.title: Share your story
story.description: Write the moment, mood, or message you want the song to carry.

lyrics.title: Get structured lyrics
lyrics.description: AI turns the story into verses, chorus, and style direction.

song.title: Generate and share
song.description: Create audio, review the producer report, and publish a public song page.

finalCta.title: Ready to make your story sing?
finalCta.subtitle: Start with one real detail. Hit-Song will help shape the rest.

create.title: Turn Your Story Into a Hit Song
create.subtitle: Start with a moment, confession, memory, or feeling. We will shape it into a structured lyric draft.
create.inputHint: A few vivid details help the song feel personal.
create.inputTooShort: Tell a little more of the story first.
create.emptyState: Your lyrics will appear here after the first draft.

seo.title: {title} - AI Generated {style} Song | Hit-Song
seo.description: Listen to "{title}", an AI-generated {style} song with a {mood} mood. {story} Create your own song with Hit-Song.

cta.title: Turn your story into a song
cta.description: Start with a memory, mood, or message. Hit-Song turns it into lyrics, audio, and a public page built for sharing.

dashboard.title: My Songs
dashboard.noSongs: No songs yet. Create your first hit!

report.subtitleReady: Generated on {date}. Use this report to understand the song's strongest emotional and production opportunities.
report.subtitleMissing: Generate a producer-style report after your song is ready. The report costs 100 credits unless credit checks are skipped in this environment.
report.emptyBody: Generate the report to unlock score dimensions, producer notes, emotional value, hook analysis, and share-ready summary copy.

seo.title: Hit-Song Pricing - AI Song Creation Plans
seo.description: Choose a Hit-Song plan for creating AI lyrics, audio, producer reports, and shareable public song pages.

pricingPage.title: Simple plans for turning stories into songs
pricingPage.subtitle: Start small, generate complete songs, and upgrade when you need more creation volume.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: For trying a personal song idea.

creator.name: Creator
creator.description: For regular song drafts and reports.
creator.feature3: Track plays, shares, and CTA clicks

studio.name: Studio
studio.description: For teams and higher creation volume.

draft_no_audio.subject: Your lyrics are ready for music
draft_no_audio.preheader: Turn {songTitle} into audio when you are ready.
draft_no_audio.title: Give {songTitle} its sound
draft_no_audio.body: Your lyric draft is waiting in Hit-Song. Come back to generate audio and hear where the story can go next.
draft_no_audio.footer: You are receiving this because you started a song on Hit-Song. You can ignore this email if you already finished it.

ready_no_report.subject: Your song is ready for its producer report
ready_no_report.preheader: Unlock the strengths and next steps for {songTitle}.
ready_no_report.title: See what works in {songTitle}
ready_no_report.body: The audio is ready. Generate the producer-style report to review score dimensions, hook notes, and share-ready summary copy.
ready_no_report.footer: You are receiving this because you created a song on Hit-Song.

report_no_share.subject: Your song report is ready to share
report_no_share.title: Share {songTitle} with someone
report_no_share.body: Your report is ready, but the song has not been shared yet. Open the public page and let someone hear the track.
report_no_share.footer: You are receiving this because you created a song on Hit-Song.

inactive_creator.subject: Have another story to turn into a song?
inactive_creator.preheader: Start a new Hit-Song from a fresh memory or mood.
inactive_creator.title: Your next song can start with one detail
inactive_creator.body: It has been a little while since your last finished song. Come back with a new feeling, memory, or message and shape it into something playable.
inactive_creator.footer: You are receiving this because you have created music on Hit-Song.

errors.insufficientCredits: Not enough credits. Please top up.
errors.contentFlagged: This story can't be written. Try a different one?
